user.title: FordPass Setup
user.description: Choose how you want to set up FordPass

new_account.title: New FordPass Account
new_account.description: Set up a new FordPass account

data_description.username: If using a mobile instead of email please enter your number include + and the country code (+99123456789)

add_vehicle.title: Add Vehicle to Existing Account
add_vehicle.description: Add another vehicle to an existing FordPass account

token.title: Sign In with Ford
token.description:
**[Click here to sign in with your Ford account]({login_url})**

After signing in, Home Assistant will automatically receive an authorization code from Ford and continue setup.

**If the automatic redirect does not work** (e.g. if your browser shows a `fordapp://` URL that it cannot open), copy the full redirect URL (which contains your sign-in code) from the browser address bar and paste it into the field below.

data.tokenstr: Ford Redirect URL (optional fallback — starts with fordapp://)

vin.title: Enter VIN
vin.description: Enter the VIN of the vehicle to add

abort.no_vehicles: No unconfigured vehicles found on this account
